body.title: Replace silent except blocks in 6 cognition files with logged handlers
body.result: logged all 12 silent except-pass blocks across coa.py, dreaming.py, narrative_engine.py, cortex.py, pe_chain.py, worker_foreman.py
body.description:
21 silent excepts in coa.py, dreaming.py, narrative_engine.py, cortex.py, pe_chain.py, worker_foreman.py are blinding the operator to upstream failures during stuck-NE incidents. Replace each with a typed, logged handler so failures surface without changing control flow.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/coa.py, wild_igor/igor/cognition/dreaming.py, wild_igor/igor/cognition/narrative_engine.py, wild_igor/igor/memory/cortex.py, wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain.py, wild_igor/igor/tools/worker_foreman.py
**Design rules:** no bare except:; each handler must log at WARNING or above with the exception type and context
**Scope boundary:** in scope: replace silent excepts with logged+typed handlers; add CI grep assertion that bare except: is zero in these 6 files. Out of scope: changing control flow, adding recovery logic, any other files.
**Test plan:** CI grep assertion that none of the 6 files contain bare 'except:' or 'except Exception: pass'; smoke-run of each module to verify no import breakage after changes.
